resources.string: No one installed App needs to be backed

plurals.name: auto_apps_backup_ended_with_error
plurals.item: Backup of %2$s has been created, but there was an error when trying to perform other
Backups of %2$s have been created, but there was an error when trying to perform other

plurals.name: count_apks_extended
plurals.item: App includes %1$d APK which occupies about %2$s of storage
App includes %1$d APKs which occupies about %2$s of storage

plurals.name: count_apks_extended_with_data_size
plurals.item: App includes %1$d APK which occupies about %2$s of storage (the size of the app\'s data is around %3$s)
App includes %1$d APKs which occupies about %2$s of storage (the size of the app\'s data is around %3$s)
